block.plentifulponds.fish_pond.not_same: Fish: We don't like that fish here...
block.plentifulponds.fish_pond.fish_ques: Fish: We'd feel more at home with %s of these:
Fish: This really makes us feel at home!
Fish: Thanks but we need %s more of these to be happy...
block.plentifulponds.fish_pond.no_alt: Fish: We won't change our mind on this one!
block.plentifulponds.fish_pond.fish_ques: Fish: Fine sure! We'll take %s of these:
item.plentifulponds.sea_biscuit.descript: Use on a Fish Pond to double chance of non-Roe items
jei.plentifulponds.fish_farming.info: Hover over items for more info.
gui.plentifulponds.pond.name: %s Pond
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor_quest0: We need this to reach our true pondtential!
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor_quest2: We have a small request for you...
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor_quest3: Trust us, we require this for the pond.
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor_quest4: Could you do us a favor? Please?
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor_quest5: Bring this to us. This is not a negotiation.
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor0: The pond is still... For now.
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor1: You hear the fish splashing around!
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor2: The fish are swimming around methodically.
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor4: The fish are playing trading cards.
gui.plentifulponds.pond.flavor5: What more could a fish dream for?

gui.tooltip.plentifulponds.pond.bring_tu: Right Click the Pond to submit
gui.tooltip.plentifulponds.pond.clear_tu: Sneak + Right Click on Pond to empty.
